---
title: Monthly Employment
author: Mohsen
YEAR: `r Sys.YEAR()`
output:
  html_document:
    theme: readable    
    highlight: kate
    toc: true    
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true    
    data_print: paged
    code_folding: hide    
    css: styles.css
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Set global options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE)
```

```{r loadlibraries, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tempdisagg)
library(zoo)
library(foreign)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r loadd_ata, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
data <- read_dta("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/psid_employment_long.dta")
```

```{r data_preprocessing}
# Extract month and year from MONTH_YEAR, then remove MONTH_YEAR column
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    month = str_extract(MONTH_YEAR, "^[A-Z]+"),
    year = str_extract(MONTH_YEAR, "\\d+$"),
    month = match(month, toupper(month.abb))
  ) %>%
  select(-MONTH_YEAR)
```

```{r add_lags}
# Add lagged variables
data <- data %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  mutate(
    LAG_UNE_ = lag(UNE_),
    LAG_EMP_ = lag(EMP_),
    LAG_OUT_ = lag(OUT_)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    LAG_UNE_ = coalesce(LAG_UNE_, 0),
    LAG_EMP_ = coalesce(LAG_EMP_, 0),
    LAG_OUT_ = coalesce(LAG_OUT_, 0),
    WEIGHT_  = coalesce(WEIGHT_, 0)
  )
```

```{r reshape_data}
# Convert columns to numeric
data$WEIGHT_ <- as.numeric(data$WEIGHT_)
data$LAG_UNE_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_UNE_)
data$LAG_EMP_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_EMP_)
data$LAG_OUT_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_OUT_)
```

```{r compute_summaries}
# Compute summary statistics
SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_UNE_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_OUT_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_EMP_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_ALL = sum(WEIGHT_, na.rm = TRUE) - n())
```

```{r compute_transitions}
# Compute transition weights
SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & (OUT_ == 1))), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1))), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & (OUT_ == 1))), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & (UNE_ == 1))), .groups = 'drop')
```

```{r calculate_transition_rates}
# Compute total weights for normalization
SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_ALL = sum(WEIGHT_, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

# Compute transition rates
TR <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    TR_EMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & (OUT_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    TR_INAC_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & (EMP_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & (OUT_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & (UNE_ == 1)), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  left_join(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP, by = c("year", "month")) %>%
  mutate(
    TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP = (TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) ,
    TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP = (TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) ,
    TR_EMP_TO_INAC = (TR_EMP_TO_INAC / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) ,
    TR_INAC_TO_EMP = (TR_INAC_TO_EMP / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) ,
    TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC = (TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) ,
    TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP = (TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP / SUM_WEIGHT_ALL) 
  ) %>%
  mutate(YEAR = ymd(paste0(year, "-", month, "-01"))) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

```

```{r plot_transition_rates}
# Function to plot transition rates
plot_transition_rates <- function(df, transition_col, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = YEAR, y = !!sym(transition_col))) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1.5) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "none")
}

# Plot and save Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_emp_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP)), "TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Employment to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Employment_to_Unemployment.png", p_emp_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP)), "TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Unemployment_to_Employment.png", p_unemp_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_emp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_INAC)), "TR_EMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Employment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Employment_to_Inactivity.png", p_emp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_EMP)), "TR_INAC_TO_EMP", "

Transition Rate from Inactivity to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Inactivity_to_Employment.png", p_inac_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC)), "TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Unemployment_to_Inactivity.png", p_unemp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR %>% filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP)), "TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Inactivity to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/Transition_Inactivity_to_Unemployment.png", p_inac_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r load_and_process_Fallick_and_Fleischman_data}
# Load Fallick_and_Fleischman data
Fallick_and_Fleischman <- read_excel("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/fallick_and_fleischman.xlsx")
Fallick_and_Fleischman <- Fallick_and_Fleischman %>%
  rename(YEAR = `Year:Mnth`) %>%
  mutate(YEAR = parse_date_time(YEAR, "ym")) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.)))) %>%
  mutate(across(c(EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop), ~ . / 100))
```

```{r combine_datasets}
# Combine transition rates with Fallick_and_Fleischman data
combined_df <- Fallick_and_Fleischman %>%
  select(YEAR, EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop) %>%
  rename(
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate = EUpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate = UEpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate = NEpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate = ENpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate = NUpop,
    Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate = UNpop
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_EU_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_UE_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_EI_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IE_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_UI_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IU_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  )
```

```{r plot_comparison}
# Function to plot and save comparisons
plot_and_save <- function(df, Fallick_and_Fleischman_col, tr_col, title, file_path) {
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.[[Fallick_and_Fleischman_col]]) & !is.na(.[[tr_col]]))
  
  if (!tr_col %in% colnames(df_clean)) {
    stop("The specified TR column does not exist in the data frame.")
  }
  
  p <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(Fallick_and_Fleischman_col), color = "Fallick_and_Fleischman"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(tr_col), color = "PSID"), size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "YEAR", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("Fallick_and_Fleischman" = "blue", "PSID" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Plot comparisons
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate", "TR_EU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_EU_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate", "TR_UE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_UE_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate", "TR_EI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_EI_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate", "TR_IE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_IE_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate", "TR_UI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_UI_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)

plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate", "TR_IU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/tr_IU_vs_Fallick_and_Fleischman.png"
)
```


```{r plot_comparison}

library(ggplot2)

# Function to plot and compare with dual y-axes
plot_dual_axis <- function(df, primary_col, secondary_col, title, file_path) {
  # Ensure columns exist
  if (!(primary_col %in% names(df)) || !(secondary_col %in% names(df))) {
    stop("One or both specified columns do not exist in the data frame.")
  }

  # Scale factor to align secondary axis with primary axis
  scale_factor <- max(df[[primary_col]], na.rm = TRUE) / max(df[[secondary_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(primary_col), color = "Primary Data"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(secondary_col) * scale_factor, color = "Secondary Data"), size = 1.2) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Primary Data",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~./scale_factor, name = "Secondary Data")  # Adjust scale_factor as needed
    ) +
    labs(x = "YEAR", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("Primary Data" = "blue", "Secondary Data" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Define a list of transition rates to compare
transition_rates <- list(
  list(primary = "TR_EU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_EU_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_UE_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_EI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_EI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_EI_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IE_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IE_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IE_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_UI_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_UI_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate", file = "tr_UI_dual_axis.png"),
  list(primary = "TR_IU_Transition_Rate", secondary = "Fallick_and_Fleischman_IU_Transition_Rate", title = "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate", file = "tr_IU_dual_axis.png")
)

# Generate plots for each transition rate comparison
for (tr in transition_rates) {
  plot_dual_axis(
    combined_df,
    tr$primary,
    tr$secondary,
    tr$title,
    paste0("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Mean_Compare/", tr$file)
  )
}

```
